title: UniBond AERO 360° Humidity Absorber with 1x Refill, Dehumidifier for Effective Air Circulation, Humidity Controller Reduces Excess Moisture, 1 Device incl. 1 refill tab 450g
features: Moisture and odour control - The AERO 360° moisture absorber device is a simple solution to effectively absorb excess moisture and neutralise bad smells. It is ideal for rooms up to 20m².
Optimal performance – This air purifier has an aerodynamic design to promote 360° air circulation. The tabs are made of active moisture-absorbing crystals with patented anti-odour agents.
Non-electric and safe – This condensation absorber is silent as it functions without electricity and provides maximum safety thanks to its spill-prevention system. Refills last up to 3 months.*
Easy to use – This odour neutraliser features a push-to-open mechanism for easy refill replacement, a spout for convenient emptying and a level indicator.
Package Contents – UniBond AERO 360° humidity absorber with 1x refill, dehumidifier for effective air circulation, humidity controller reduces excess moisture, 1 device including 1 refill tab 450g
